SURFACE: `/login` GET/POST, `/add_prescription`, `/view_prescriptions`, `/logout`, `/graphql`; client-side `userID` is used directly in GraphQL queries. BUG-HYP: Broken object-level authorization / GraphQL overexposure: authenticated normal user can query `getPrescriptions(userId: 1)` and request hidden `flag` field. WHY: `/view_prescriptions` page comment says not to pass `flag` in query parameter, but GraphQL introspection exposes `getPrescriptions`; querying another `userId` returned admin prescriptions including `flag`.
